name: Y-Axis Label
helpText: Label shown on the vertical axis of the chart.

name: Telemetry Key Regex
helpText: Regex pattern to match string current telemetry keys. Only matching keys appear in the tree. Default matches pv1_c, pv2_c, etc.

name: Line Width (px)
helpText: Default thickness of chart lines in pixels.

name: Enable Time Zoom Slider
helpText: Show a horizontal zoom slider below the chart for time range navigation.

name: Show Full Day on X-Axis
helpText: Force x-axis to span 00:00-24:00 regardless of data range. Ideal for 'Current Day' time windows.

name: Sidebar Width (%)
helpText: Width of the inverter/string tree panel as a percentage of the widget width.

name: Expand Inverters by Default
helpText: Expand all inverter groups on initial load. Recommended off for large plants.

name: Tooltip Content (Override)
helpText: Override the dynamic chart tooltip. Leave empty for auto-generated per-series values.
